items.title: The 3 Big Reasons Why GTA 6 Isn’t Coming To PC At Launch, And Why That’s A Good Thing
items.summary: It's always been thus, and it tends to work out very well in the end

items.title: Claims about GTA 6 pre-orders are incorrect and "absurd", analyst firm says, but it's still had the "strongest pre-order campaign ever recorded"
items.summary: We all knew that GTA 6 was going to be big, but new data from a video game market data analyst group suggests Rockstar's upcoming sandbox game has already earned in excess of $260m for the company. Read more

items.title: GTA 5 had "so much" cut content, including minigames that were almost "completely done," former Rockstar dev says: "They'll throw out entire levels"
items.summary: Rockstar Games apparently isn't scared to kill its darling

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 leaker who was given an indefinite sentence in 2023 because he wouldn't stop hacking is now out of hospital and awaiting retrial
items.summary: Arion Kurtaj, a member of the Lapsus$ hacking group, was behind a 2022 hack of Rockstar that revealed GTA 6 to the world more than a year before it was announced.

items.title: Former Rockstar Dev Explains GTA 6’s Console-First Approach
items.summary: GTA 6 is shaping up to be the hottest console game launch of the year, but PC gamers won't be sharing in that fun. This is par for the course with developer Rockstar Games, as it has typically prioritized console versions of its games before porting them to PC, a strategy that one former employee says will result in…

items.title: "It's not that we don't care about PC" - Former Rockstar developer suggests why GTA 6 is only coming to consoles at launch
items.summary: GTA 6 is looming like that monolith in 2001: A Space Odyssey, casting its fearsome shadow over the games industry and probably also scaring some monkeys. But PC players won't be able to join in the fun when Rockstar Games ' mega-sequel launches on 19th November, and former studio producer John Ricchio - who worked o…
